revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-125

A cap (types F, G) which has one or more pins for fixing it in the lampholder.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig25.jpg|400px|border]]


Reference: C.I.E.


Note 1: For particular numbers of pins, terms such as Three-Pin Cap are employed.


Note 2: In the U.S.A., a lamp having a cap with two pins is called a Bi-Post Lamp.


{{IALAFooter}}
